summary: First-finish smoke tests for Sukanand Yedle portfolio. Backend endpoints (GET /api/, POST /api/contact, GET /api/contact) all functioning as expected with proper 422 validation for bad/missing input. Frontend loads, hero name renders, all 8 nav links visible and scroll to sections, all sections present, projects include TravelCV, skills has 6 cards, contact form submits successfully (success toast shown, fields cleared, MongoDB save confirmed via GET /api/contact), mobile menu toggle works at 390px viewport.
passed: GET /api/ -> 200 with message 'Sukanand Yedle Portfolio API is running'
POST /api/contact valid payload -> 200 with id + created_at
GET /api/contact -> 200 list, includes just-created message, sorted desc
Homepage loads without page errors; hero-name shows 'Sukanand Yedle'
Contact form (data-testid=contact-form) submits to /api/contact and shows toast 'Message sent — I'll get back to you.'
Contact form fields clear after successful submit
Mobile viewport (390x844): mobile-menu-toggle visible and mobile-menu opens after click
notes: Empty/invalid email validation is handled by HTML5 native validation (input type=email + required) rather than an explicit error toast; backend still enforces via 422. Acceptable for MVP.
Achievements animated counters and full section visual polish not deeply validated (deferred to full QA).
